statement: Read amplification inside run reconciliation is a dominant blocker for active run progression under current fanout.
rationale: Convex insights repeatedly flags bytes-read-limit errors in domain/runs/run_service.js:reconcileRunStage around active stall windows.
keyAssumptions: Recent insights reflect present bottlenecks for current run cohort
validationCriteria: After scheduler resume, reconciliation errors continue to surface at similar rate
critiquePoints: Provider-side transient errors are also present and can co-contribute
questions: Which exact per-stage query paths in reconcileRunStage should be bounded first?
